last_success: RAG v3 implemented. Hybrid search (dense + BM25 via Qdrant native sparse vectors + RRF fusion). Self-correcting retrieval (relevance_gate_node with 0.4 threshold, max 1 retry without filters). Strict markdown response format with multi-title few-shot. All docs updated.
next_step: Restart backend with new code. Run full 50-question evaluation on baseline + ragv1 pipelines. Compare FActScore + RAGAS before/after hybrid search. Consider adding ragv2 pipeline to collect.py for the new architecture.

run_order: 2. cd backend && python scripts/ingest.py --reset   # if collection empty
5. Eval: conda run -n animind python eval/collect.py --pipeline all

6. FActScore: conda run -n factscore python eval/factscore_runner.py --input eval/results/raw_baseline.json --output eval/results/factscore_baseline_v1.json --db eval/factscore_db/anime_kb.db --judge-model gpt-4o-mini --gamma 0

agent_notes.qa_pipeline: contextualize → extract_filters → rewrite → hybrid_retrieve(20, dense+BM25 RRF) → rerank(5) → relevance_gate(0.4) → [retry once if low] → build_context → LLM([system]+[history 5 pairs]+[context+question])
agent_notes.detail_pipeline: extract_title → get_anime_details (anilist_id scroll OR vector similarity) → format_detail → LLM
agent_notes.history_window: synthesizer: last 5 turn-pairs (10 msgs). contextualizer: last 4 turn-pairs (8 msgs).
agent_notes.session_id: thread_id UUID4 in LangGraph config. Frontend generates UUID, stores in localStorage. Frontend: chat.vinhkaguya.me (self-hosted Next.js :3000).
agent_notes.streaming: synthesizer_node uses LangChain ChatOpenAI for on_chat_model_stream events. SSE via /chat/stream → Next.js proxy /api/chat/stream.

pipeline_registry.baseline: run_baseline — direct retrieve(top-5) → generate (no rewrite, no reranker)
pipeline_registry.ragv1: run_ragv1 — rewrite → filter → retrieve(top-20) → rerank(top-5) → generate

eval_notes.kb: SQLite FTS5 — 18650+ entries, structured 'field: value' format for BM25 retrieval
eval_notes.context_format:
TITLE | Year: YYYY | Format: TV | Score: X/10 | Genres: ... | Episodes: N | Studio: X
Synopsis (600 chars)

middleware_stack.note: Starlette add_middleware is LIFO. Last added = outermost = first on request.

rag_pipeline_notes.search_mode: hybrid: dense + BM25 sparse via Qdrant query_points() with Prefetch + FusionQuery(RRF)
rag_pipeline_notes.chat_model: gpt-4o-mini (dev) / gpt-4o (prod) — LangChain ChatOpenAI in synthesizer for SSE
rag_pipeline_notes.retry_strategy: drop filters + skip query rewrite for max recall
rag_pipeline_notes.auto_filter: extract_filters() parses year/genre/format/score from natural language
rag_pipeline_notes.response_format: strict markdown bullet list, one anime per bullet, ranked by score

known_gotchas: AsyncOpenAI: all methods are coroutines, must be awaited
AsyncSqliteSaver.from_conn_string() is an async context manager — use 'async with' in FastAPI lifespan
LangGraph thread_id MUST be passed in every ainvoke() config — without it each call is a fresh conversation
Starlette add_middleware is LIFO — last added = outermost. Security headers must be added AFTER CORS.
grep for HTTP headers is case-sensitive; uvicorn sends lowercase. Use grep -i.
synthesizer_node uses LangChain ChatOpenAI (not raw AsyncOpenAI) so astream_events v2 can capture on_chat_model_stream
cloudflared tunnel create output: 'Created tunnel <name> with id <UUID>' — must extract UUID not name for credentials-file path
systemd service WorkingDirectory must be backend/ not project root — uvicorn needs to import app.main
FActScore runner MUST run in 'factscore' conda env (openai<1.0) — never import factscore_runner from animind env
httpx.AsyncClient teardown may log 'Event loop is closed' warnings — cosmetic only, not a functional error
BM25 FTS5: strip special chars with re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ') — do NOT use isalnum() which drops entire tokens like 'Steins;Gate'
